intro:
Build the cutest cat café empire!
Serve happy customers, hire adorable staff,
and grow across 3 cozy locations!
description:
Welcome to Cozy Cat Cafe, a relaxing and adorable management game where cute chibi cats run the coziest food businesses in town!

Serve customers, earn money, and grow your tiny shop into a thriving cat business. Upgrade your counters, add tables and furniture, expand your space, improve production, and keep your customers happy as your profits grow.

Hire adorable cat workers, unlock new features, and build the perfect team to help your business run smoothly. You can also improve your own character with useful upgrades to work faster and manage even more efficiently.

Progress through 3 unique locations and grow each one step by step:
●Burger Restaurant
●Coffee Café
●Donut Shop

Unlock new locations as you play, then travel between them and continue building your cozy cat business empire.

With its cute top-down visuals, satisfying upgrades, relaxing atmosphere, and lovable cat-filled world, Cozy Cat Cafe is a wholesome and easy-to-enjoy experience for players who love cozy games, management, and steady progression.

Features:

● Run adorable food businesses as a cute cat
● Upgrade furniture, counters, production, and guest areas
● Hire charming cat staff and grow your team
● Unlock and manage 3 cozy locations
● Improve your character with useful upgrades
● Relaxing, casual, and satisfying gameplay

Build, upgrade, hire, and create the cutest café empire ever!
